basic_details.job_title: Anna University Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 10 Surveyor, MIS Manager and More Posts
basic_details.short_information: Anna University (AU) has published the Consultancy Project Staff Notification 2026 on 11 May 2026. The recruitment drive aims to fill 10 Consultancy Project Staff positions. Candidates within the age range as specified in the official notification and holding various qualifications as per post requirement are eligible to apply offline at annauniv.edu. The application process will be active from the release date 11 May 2026 to 22 May 2026, and candidates can easily access the notification PDF and application instructions below.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.details: Team Leader - Environmental Expert: B.E./B.Tech. in Civil Engineering/Environmental Engineering/ Mechanical Engineering/Electrical Engineering/Chemical Engineering/Energy and Environment and M.E./M.Tech. in Environmental Engineering/Environmental Management/ Environmental Science and Technology. Priority would be given to candidates having 10 years of experience and expertise in SWM/Bio-mining Projects. [10+HSC+UG+PG Pattern] Environmental and Safety Officer: Diploma in Industrial Safety/Health, Safety and Environment Management/Fire Safety and Disaster Management, M.Tech. in Industrial Safety and Hazardous Management and allied degree. Priority would be given to candidates having Safety certification from reputed Safety Organization with 2 years of experience. Final year PG students can apply. MIS Manager: Graduate in any discipline in Engineering. Priority would be given to candidates having 1 year experience in preparation of MIS reports and management. Knowledge of PLA based software & proficiency of basic finance and advance MS Excel is desirable. Certifications in Data Analytics, MIS, or Statistical Analysis is preferred. [10+HSC+UG Pattern] ESHS Manager: Post Graduate in Environmental Engineering/Environmental Management/Environmental Science/Social Work/Sociology and allied degree. Priority would be given to candidates having Safety certification from reputed Safety Organization and having 1 year experience in developing, implementing, and monitoring of the company in relation to environmental health and safety (EH&S) aspects. [10+HSC+UG+PG Pattern] Project Associate II: PhD in Environmental Engineering/Environmental Management/Environmental Biotechnology (OR) M.E./M.Tech. in Environmental Engineering/Environmental Management/Environmental Engineering and Management/Structural Engineering/Remote Sensing and Geomatics. Priority would be given to candidates having 1 year of experience in bio-mining projects. Final year PG students can apply. [10+HSC+UG+PG Pattern] Surveyor: B.E./B.Tech. in Civil Engineering/Geo informatics. Priority would be given to candidates having 1 year of work experience. Final year PG students can apply. [10+HSC+UG Pattern] Project Assistant: B.A. in English/B. Sc./BBA/B. Com/B.C.A. Priority would be given to candidates having at least 1 year of working experience and knowledge in computer operations, document preparation and typewriting. [10+HSC+UG Pattern]

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Anna University Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: annauniv.edu.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 22-05-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Anna University Consultancy Project Staff recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the Anna University Consultancy Project Staff recruitment is 22nd May 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated address by this date.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Consultancy Project Staff at Anna University?
faq.answer: Anna University is recruiting for a total of 10 vacancies for the Consultancy Project Staff positions. These positions are spread across various roles as detailed in the notification.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is offline. Candidates need to download the application form, fill it, and send it to the specified address via post.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary range for the Consultancy Project Staff positions?
faq.answer: The salary for the Consultancy Project Staff positions ranges from Rs. 24,000/- to Rs. 85,000/- per month, depending on the specific post and qualifications.

faq.question: Q5. Are there any application fees for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there are no application fees mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive. Candidates can apply without paying any fee.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for the Anna University Consultancy Project Staff roles?
faq.answer: The selection process for these positions will involve shortlisting of applications followed by an interview. Candidates are advised to prepare well for both stages.

faq.question: Q7. Which educational qualifications are required for the Project Associate II post?
faq.answer: For the Project Associate II post, candidates need a PhD in Environmental Engineering/Environmental Management/Environmental Biotechnology or M.E./M.Tech. in relevant environmental or engineering fields. Experience in bio-mining projects is preferred.

faq.question: Q8. Can final year PG students apply for the Environmental and Safety Officer post?
faq.answer: Yes, final year PG students are eligible to apply for the Environmental and Safety Officer post. However, they should ensure they meet other specified criteria.

faq.question: Q9. What is the location of the job?
faq.answer: The jobs are located in Chennai, Tamil Nadu, with the specific address being Kodungaiyur, Chennai - 600025.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be accessed through the Important Links section of this article. You will find direct links to download these documents.
